minimapConfig.description: Use this data to create a dynamic minimap arrow and zone-based map switching

usage.position: Each node has x,y coordinates on the floor plan (in plan pixels)
usage.orientation: node.yaw is the north/reference angle for that pano (degrees, 0=east, CCW)
usage.floorPlan: floors[].planWidth, planHeight define coordinate space; floors[].image is the plan image filename
usage.floorNorth: floors[].northDeg is the compass north offset for the floor (degrees)
usage.calculation: arrowRotation = floorNorth + nodeYaw + cameraYaw (where cameraYaw is current view direction)
usage.dynamicMap: zones[].minimapFloorId specifies which floor plan to show when entering that zone
usage.mapSwitching: When clicking a zone-type hotspot, switch minimap to zones[hotspot.to].minimapFloorId (or node's floor if not set)
usage.nestedZones: zones[].parentZoneId can be used to build a zone tree (zone-in-zone) for UI grouping and filtering
